title: Fabric Random Entities
description: Fabric mod to replicate the Optifine random entities feature set
body:
### The goal of this mod is to replicate the Optifine random entities feature set, but in Fabric.

**Should be fully compatible with Sodium and Iris.**

This project is still in Alpha stage, expect some issues and report them when you can.

![Sample image of Random and Emissive Textures](https://github.com/MrJoshuaT/Fabric-Random-Entities/blob/master/images/sample_image.png?raw=true)

### What can it do?
* Loading and parsing of Optifine packs
* Random textures based upon .properties rules and generic variations
* Emissive textures
* Eyes feature renderer - *this is turned off when Iris is loaded, for now*
* Villager outer layer feature renderer
* Should support modded gameplay, the code should not make any distinctions between vanilla and not

### What can it not do? (for now)
* ModMenu options integration
* Properties name rule is not adhered to at all, and is ignored for time being
* Other feature renderers, for like Withers etc
* Support for paintings
* Not tested all entities, such as horses, wolfs etc
